goal: Final qualification of the microstructure route into one of three honest statuses: confirmed true overlay, confirmed replacement layer, or watchlist/reject against immutable base active-signal-v1@1.
global_constraints: Never modify the immutable base snapshot active-signal-v1@1.
All key comparisons must use active-signal-v1@1 as the sole decision reference; @3 is auxiliary only.
Overlay and replacement tracks must never be mixed in the same narrative or run.
Every threshold must have documented provenance: quantile rule or selection-OOS search with frozen lockbox. No hand-tuned magic numbers.
All comparisons must be same-window: base @1, variant, and combined run on identical time windows.
Simple rules (bucket, threshold, quantile) must be evaluated before any model-based approach.
Short-only, long-only, and combined side splits must all be evaluated independently.
Old routes (IV, breadth, path-asymmetry, regime-disagreement, directional classification on old universe) are closed and must not be reopened.
No new data families or macro universe until microstructure qualification is complete.

slices.title: Freeze terminology and correction log
slices.hypothesis: Establish a clean v12 research project with corrected terminology, immutable reference lock, and structured open-items register so that overlay and replacement are never confused again.
slices.objective: Establish a clean v12 research project with corrected terminology, immutable reference lock, and structured open-items register so that overlay and replacement are never confused again.
success_criteria: Clean v12 project exists with corrected terminology and locked baseline reference.
Research map axes created and open-items register populated.
evidence_requirements: Clean v12 project exists with corrected terminology and locked baseline reference.
Research map axes created and open-items register populated.

slices.title: Rebuild exact base @1 comparison frame
slices.hypothesis: Produce one canonical lockbox reference run of the immutable base snapshot @1 with full trade-level detail, serving as the sole comparison baseline for all v12 work.
slices.objective: Produce one canonical lockbox reference run of the immutable base snapshot @1 with full trade-level detail, serving as the sole comparison baseline for all v12 work.
success_criteria: One canonical base_ref1_lockbox_run exists with complete trade-level metrics.
evidence_requirements: One canonical base_ref1_lockbox_run exists with complete trade-level metrics.

slices.title: Threshold provenance and selection discipline
slices.hypothesis: Replace hand-tuned thresholds with a principled selection procedure, producing up to 3 frozen threshold sets with documented provenance before any lockbox rerun.
slices.objective: Replace hand-tuned thresholds with a principled selection procedure, producing up to 3 frozen threshold sets with documented provenance before any lockbox rerun.
success_criteria: Frozen threshold sets with documented provenance exist.
No threshold lacks an explainable origin.
evidence_requirements: Frozen threshold sets with documented provenance exist.
No threshold lacks an explainable origin.
